queries.text:
bctraces
| where customDimensions.eventId == 'RT0018'
| extend extensionName = tostring(customDimensions.extensionName)
  , alObjectName = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectName)
  , alMethod = tostring( customDimensions.alMethod) 
  , entraTenantId = tostring(customDimensions.aadTenantId)
| extend environmentName = tostring(customDimensions.environmentName)
, alObjectInfo = strcat(customDimensions.alObjectType, ' ', customDimensions.alObjectId, ' - ', alObjectName)
, executionTimeInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.executionTime))/10000 //the datatype for executionTime is timespan 
, suspendedTime = customDimensions.suspendedTime // will come on 22.x
, extensionInfo = strcat( extensionName, ' ', customDimensions.extensionVersion)
, clientType = tostring(customDimensions.clientType)
, exclusiveTime = customDimensions.exclusiveTime // This dimension was introduced in Business Central 2023 release wave 1, version 22.1. Backported to version 21.6
, exclusiveTimeInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.exclusiveTime))/10000 //the datatype for exclusiveTime is timespan 
, alStackTrace = tostring(customDimensions.alStackTrace)
, longRunningThreshold = tostring(customDimensions.longRunningThreshold)
, longRunningThresholdInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.longRunningThreshold))/10000 //the datatype for executionTime is timespan 
, sqlExecutes = toint(customDimensions.sqlExecutes) // This dimension was introduced in Business Central 2023 release wave 1, version 22.0
, sqlRowsRead = toint(customDimensions.sqlRowsRead) // This dimension was introduced in Business Central 2023 release wave 1, version 22.0
, usertelemetryId = case(
  // user telemetry id was introduced in the platform in version 20.0
  toint( substring(customDimensions.componentVersion,0,2)) >= 20, user_Id
, 'N/A')
| summarize count(), distinctTenants = count_distinct(entraTenantId), distinctEnvironments = count_distinct(strcat(entraTenantId, environmentName))
  , sum( executionTimeInMS ), avg( executionTimeInMS ), sum(exclusiveTimeInMS), avg(exclusiveTimeInMS) 
  by alObjectInfo, alMethod, extensionName, clientType
| order by sum_executionTimeInMS 
| project 
    ['AL Extension'] = extensionName,
    ["AL Object Information"] = alObjectInfo,
    ["AL Method"] = alMethod,
    ["Client Type"] = clientType,
    ["Ocurrance"] = count_,
    ["tenants"] = distinctTenants,
    environments = distinctEnvironments,
    ["Avg Duration"] = round(avg_executionTimeInMS, 0),
    ["Total Duration"] = round(sum_executionTimeInMS,0),
    ["Avg Exclusive Time"] = round(avg_exclusiveTimeInMS,0),
    ["Total Exclusive Time"] = round(sum_exclusiveTimeInMS,0)
| sort by ['Total Duration'] desc

let _searchType = toupper('PAGE');
bctraces
| where customDimensions.eventId == 'RT0018'
| where toupper(customDimensions.alObjectType) == _searchType
| extend extensionName = tostring(customDimensions.extensionName)
  , alObjectName = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectName)
  , alMethod = tostring( customDimensions.alMethod) 
| extend alObjectInfo = strcat(customDimensions.alObjectType, ' ', customDimensions.alObjectId, ' - ', alObjectName)
, executionTime = customDimensions.executionTime
, executionTimeInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.executionTime))/10000 //the datatype for executionTime is timespan 
| extend executionTimeInSec = executionTimeInMS / 1000
| summarize count(), sum( executionTimeInSec ), avg( executionTimeInSec ) by alObjectInfo
| order by sum_executionTimeInSec desc 
| project ["AL Object Information"] = alObjectInfo,
    ["Ocurrance"] = count_,
    ["Avg Duration"] = round(avg_executionTimeInSec, 2),
    ["Total Duration"] = toint(round(sum_executionTimeInSec,2))
| sort by ['Total Duration'] desc

bcpageviews
| extend alObjectName = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectName)
| extend alObjectId = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectId)
    , extensionName = tostring(customDimensions.appName)
    , eventId = tostring(customDimensions.eventID) // note that this is different from other signal
    , pageMode = tostring(customDimensions.pageMode)
    , pageType = tostring(customDimensions.pageType)
| summarize 
    ExecutionCount = count(),
    minTime = toint(min(duration)),
    avgTime = toint(avg(duration)),
    maxTime = toint(max(duration)),
    stdDev = stdev(duration)
    by
    extensionName,
    alObjectId,
    alObjectName,
    eventId,
    pageType
| project
    ["App Name"] = extensionName,
    ["AL Object ID"] = alObjectId,
    ["AL Object Name"] = alObjectName,
    ["Page Type"] = pageType,
    ["Execution Count"] = ExecutionCount,
    ["Min. Time"] = minTime,
    ["Avg. Time"] = avgTime,
    ["Max. Time"] = maxTime,
    ["Std Dev"] = round(stdDev,0)
| order by ['Execution Count'] desc

let traceEvents = bctraces
| extend 
  AadTenantId = tostring( customDimensions.aadTenantId )
, EnvironmentName = tostring( customDimensions.environmentName )
| extend TenantId = strcat( toupper(AadTenantId), toupper(EnvironmentName) )

let TableCount = (
bctraces
| where customDimensions.eventId == 'RT0018' // starting from version 16.1, the eventId is used to identity signal types
| where customDimensions.alObjectId > 0 // filter out internal server calls
| project 
timestamp
, extensionId = tostring(customDimensions.extensionId)
, extensionPublisher = tostring(customDimensions.extensionPublisher)
, extensionName = tostring(customDimensions.extensionName)
, alObjectId = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectId)
, alObjectType = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectType)
, alObjectName = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectName)
, alObjectMethod = tostring(customDimensions.alMethod)
, executionTimeInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.executionTime))/10000 //the datatype for executionTime is timespan 
, dayBin = bin(timestamp,1d)
| extend day = strcat(strcat(format_datetime(dayBin, "yyyy-MM-dd"))," (Count)") 
| project-away timestamp, dayBin, executionTimeInMS
| sort by day asc 
| evaluate pivot(day, count())
);
TableCount
| join
(bctraces
| where customDimensions.eventId == 'RT0018' // starting from version 16.1, the eventId is used to identity signal types
| where customDimensions.alObjectId > 0 // filter out internal server calls
| project 
timestamp
, extensionId = tostring(customDimensions.extensionId)
, extensionPublisher = tostring(customDimensions.extensionPublisher)
, extensionName = tostring(customDimensions.extensionName)
, alObjectId = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectId)
, alObjectType = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectType)
, alObjectName = tostring(customDimensions.alObjectName)
, alObjectMethod = tostring(customDimensions.alMethod)
, executionTimeInMS = toreal(totimespan(customDimensions.executionTime))/10000 //the datatype for executionTime is timespan 
// this part of the query derives various insights from the SQL statement
, dayBin = bin(timestamp,1d)
| extend day = strcat(strcat(format_datetime(dayBin, "yyyy-MM-dd")), " (avg)")
| project-away timestamp, dayBin
| summarize Average = round(avg(executionTimeInMS),0) by extensionId, extensionPublisher, extensionName, alObjectType, alObjectId, alObjectName, alObjectMethod, day
| sort by day asc 
| evaluate pivot(day,sum(Average))
)
on
$left.extensionId == $right.extensionId,
$left.extensionPublisher == $right.extensionPublisher,
$left.extensionName == $right.extensionName,
$left.alObjectType == $right.alObjectType,
$left.alObjectId == $right.alObjectId,
$left.alObjectName == $right.alObjectName,
$left.alObjectMethod == $right.alObjectMethod
| project-away extensionId, extensionId1, extensionPublisher1, extensionName1, alObjectType1, alObjectId1, alObjectName1, alObjectMethod1

let apptraces = bctraces
    | summarize appTracesBilledSizeInBytes = sum(_BilledSize)
    | extend appTracesSizeInGB = round(appTracesBilledSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024),2)  // Convert bytes to GB
    | extend appTracesExpctBill = strcat(round(appTracesSizeInGB * 2.99,2)," $");
let appPageViews = bcpageviews
    | summarize appPageViewsBilledSizeInBytes = sum(_BilledSize)
    | extend appPageViewsSizeInGB = round(appPageViewsBilledSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024),2)  // Convert bytes to GB
    | extend appPageViewsExpctBill = strcat(round(appPageViewsSizeInGB * 2.99,2)," $");
let _alltablestw = union *
    | where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime) 
    | summarize TotalBilledSizeInBytes = sum(_BilledSize)
    | extend SizeInGB = round(TotalBilledSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024),2)  // Convert bytes to GB
    | extend ExpectedBilling = strcat(round(SizeInGB * 2.99,2)," $");
let _alltables = union *
    | where timestamp > ago(31d)
    | summarize TotalBilledSizeInBytes = sum(_BilledSize)
    | extend SizeInGB = round(TotalBilledSizeInBytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024),2)  // Convert bytes to GB
    | extend ExpectedBilling = strcat(round(SizeInGB * 2.99,2)," $");

| where customDimensions.environmentType has_any (_InsiderEnvironmentType)
| where customDimensions.environmentName has_any (_InsiderEnvironmentName)
| project timestamp       
        , entraTenantId = tostring(customDimensions.alAadTenantId)
        , environmentType = tostring(iif(customDimensions.alSandbox == "false", "Production", "Sandbox")) 
        , environmentName = tostring(customDimensions.environmentName)
        , environmentDeployment = iif(customDimensions.alSaaS == "true", "Online", "On-Prem")
        , onlineDomainName = replace_string(tostring(customDimensions.alSaaSDomainName),".onmicrosoft.com","")
        , databaseName = tostring(customDimensions.alDatabaseName)
        , appServerName = tostring(customDimensions.alServerName)
        , serviceInstanceId = tostring(customDimensions.alServiceInstanceId)
        , serviceInstanceName = tostring(customDimensions.alServiceInstanceName)
        , componentVersion = tostring(customDimensions.componentVersion)
        , platformVersion = tostring(customDimensions.alPlatformVersion)        
        , appVersion = tostring(customDimensions.alApplicationVersion)
        , appLocalization = substring(tostring(customDimensions.alApplicationVersion),0,2)
        , appsCount = toint(customDimensions.alAppCount)
        , totalUserCount = toint(customDimensions.alTotalUserCount)
        , fullUserCount = toint(customDimensions.alFullUserCount)
        , limitedUserCount = toint(customDimensions.alLimitedUserCount)
        , licenseNo = tostring(customDimensions.alLicenseSerialNo)
        , customerId = tostring(customDimensions.alCustomerId)
        , extensionInfo = parse_json(strcat("[",
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_1),
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_1,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_1)-2),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_2), strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_2,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_2)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_3),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_3,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_3)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_4),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_4,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_4)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_5),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_5,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_5)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_6),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_6,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_6)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_7),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_7,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_7)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_8),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_8,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_8)-2)),""),
                iif(isnotempty(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_9),strcat(",",
                        substring(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_9,1,strlen(customDimensions.alInstalledApps_9)-2)),"")  
                ,"]"      
        ))
| mv-expand extensionInfo 
| extend id = substring(tolower(tostring(extensionInfo.Id)),1,strlen(extensionInfo.Id)-2)
    	, extensionName = tostring(extensionInfo.Name)
        , extensionVersion = tostring(extensionInfo.Version)
    	, extensionPublisher = tostring(extensionInfo.Publisher)
        , databaseRegion = iif(environmentDeployment == "Online", replace_string(tostring(split(databaseName,"_")[1]),"bcprod","") ,"")
        , databaseTenantId = iif(environmentDeployment == "Online", toupper(replace_string(tostring(split(databaseName,"_")[2]),"bcprod","")) ,"")
| extend isEOS = iif(_ExcludeEOS == true, iif(extensionPublisher startswith "EOS", true, false), false)
| where isEOS == false
| project-away extensionInfo
| where extensionPublisher has_any (_NearbyPublisher)
| where extensionName  has_any (_NearbyAppName)
| distinct entraTenantId, environmentName, environmentType

traces

| where customDimensions.environmentName has_any (_environmentName)
| where customDimensions.clientType has_any (_clientType)
